description: Smart update protection, session-start task awareness, improved start flow
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(update): user-deleted files are now preserved — if you intentionally deleted a file, feature update won't re-add it
- feat(update): config.yaml `update.skip` support — specify files or directories to permanently exclude from updates
- feat(hooks): session-start hooks now inject `<task-status>` with structured state (NO ACTIVE TASK / NOT READY / READY / COMPLETED), enabling AI to auto-resume tasks
- feat(hooks): dynamic spec directory discovery in session-start, supporting monorepo package layouts
- feat(start): brainstorm enforcement — complex tasks now automatically trigger brainstorm flow across all platforms
notes: Run feature update to sync updated hook scripts and command templates.
